## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] `mix precommit` passes (compile --warnings-as-errors, format, tests)
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) per the [DCO](../CONTRIBUTING.md#developer-certificate-of-origin-dco)
- [ ] Change is edition-neutral (no dependency on commercial billing; cloud-specific behaviour goes through a config seam)
- [ ] Docs/comments updated where relevant
